base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of norfair_squeept_jump — a character from 1986 metroid. Squeept — mini-lava-enemy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Squeept — mini-lava-enemy; jumps out of lava
